summary: The time from voucher issuance to a household actually moving in swung widely — 101 days in fiscal 2022 up to 142 in fiscal 2025 — largely tracking the same shift HPD cites for its related voucher-issuance-time measure: a growing share of Tenant-Based Vouchers, whose holders must search for and secure housing themselves on the private market, versus Project-Based Vouchers, which are pre-matched to units and lease up faster.
oneLiner: increasing, largely due to a shift toward slower-to-lease tenant-based vouchers
